data.SOURCE:
@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'EHO Banka Verisi'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define view entity YEHO_DDL_I_BANK_DATA
  as select from yeho_t_offlinedt
{
  key companycode                   as Companycode,
  key glaccount                     as Glaccount,
  key receipt_no                    as ReceiptNo,
  key physical_operation_date       as PhysicalOperationDate,
  key currency                      as Currency,
      sequence_no                   as SequenceNo,
      time                          as Time,
      description                   as Description,
      payee_vkn                     as PayeeVkn,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Transactioncurrency'
      current_balance               as CurrentBalance,
      debit_credit                  as DebitCredit,
      debtor_vkn                    as DebtorVkn,
      sender_name                   as SenderName,
      sender_bank                   as SenderBank,
      sender_iban                   as SenderIban,
      sender_branch                 as SenderBranch,
      transaction_type              as TransactionType,
      counter_account_no            as CounterAccountNo,
      contract_no                   as ContractNo,
      company_unique_payment_no     as CompanyUniquePaymentNo,
      accounting_date               as AccountingDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Transactioncurrency'
      amount                        as Amount,
      valor                         as Valor,
      additional_field1             as AdditionalField1,
      additional_field2             as AdditionalField2,
      additional_field3             as AdditionalField3,
      document_type                 as DocumentType,
      exchange_rate                 as ExchangeRate,
      customer                      as Customer,
      supplier                      as Supplier,
      specialglcode                 as Specialglcode,
      operationalglaccount          as Operationalglaccount,
      reconciliationaccount         as Reconciliationaccount,
      taxcode                       as Taxcode,
      transactioncurrency           as Transactioncurrency,
      exchangerate                  as Exchangerate2,
      documentreferenceid           as Documentreferenceid,
      accountingdocumentheadertext  as Accountingdocumentheadertext,
      paymentmethod                 as Paymentmethod,
      paymentterms                  as Paymentterms,
      costcenter                    as Costcenter,
      orderid                       as Orderid,
      profitcenter                  as Profitcenter,
      assignmentreference           as Assignmentreference,
      personnelnumber               as Personnelnumber,
      reference1idbybusinesspartner as Reference1idbybusinesspartner,
      reference2idbybusinesspartner as Reference2idbybusinesspartner,
      reference3idbybusinesspartner as Reference3idbybusinesspartner,
      duecalculationbasedate        as Duecalculationbasedate,
      created_by                    as CreatedBy,
      create_date                   as CreateDate,
      create_time                   as CreateTime,
      arbitrage_account             as ArbitrageAccount,
      arbitrage_currency            as ArbitrageCurrency,
      arbitrage_exchange_type       as ArbitrageExchangeType,
      arbitrage_exchangerate        as ArbitrageExchangerate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'ArbitrageCurrency'
      arbitrage_amount              as ArbitrageAmount,
      arbitrage_assignmentreference as ArbitrageAssignmentreference,
      arbitrage_item_text           as ArbitrageItemText,
      arbitrage_documentreferenceid as ArbitrageDocumentreferenceid,
      arbitrage_reference1          as ArbitrageReference1,
      arbitrage_reference2          as ArbitrageReference2,
      arbitrage_reference3          as ArbitrageReference3
}
